description: Real piano recordings (Open Goldberg Variations, Kimiko Ishizaka, CC0). Ground truth MusicXML pochází z engraved MuseScore source — NE z MIDI konverze.

pieces.title: Aria
pieces.score_source: Open Goldberg Variations (Werner Schweer, MuseScore CC0)
pieces.audio_source: Kimiko Ishizaka recording (Bösendorfer 290 Imperial, Berlin 2012, CC0)
pieces.ground_truth_note: MusicXML ground truth pochází z engraved MuseScore zdroje (.mscz → MusicXML přes MuseScore CLI, lossless). NENÍ použita MIDI→MusicXML konverze.
